mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM paper_info WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT p.college_id as collegeId, c.college_name as collegeName, COUNT(*) as paperCount FROM paper_info p LEFT JOIN college c ON p.college_id = c.id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.college_id, c.college_name ORDER BY paperCount DESC

SELECT p.major_id as majorId, m.major_name as majorName, COUNT(*) as paperCount FROM paper_info p LEFT JOIN major m ON p.major_id = m.id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.major_id, m.major_name ORDER BY paperCount DESC
